name: pochamp-ai
description: Pokémon Champions 싱글 친선전용 로컬 의사결정 도우미

scripts.dev: npm run build:engine && npm run dev -w @pochamp/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build:engine && npm run build -w @pochamp/desktop
scripts.package:win: npm run build:engine && npm run package:win -w @pochamp/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @pochamp/engine && npm run build:engine && npm run test -w @pochamp/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:engine && npm run typecheck -w @pochamp/desktop
